tasks.instruction: Use the capability statement builder to generate an on-screen preview for a cybersecurity-focused federal contractor by selecting an IT/cyber-oriented template, entering sample company details (including a NAICS code, core competencies, past performance, and two target agencies), choosing a blue-themed federal design, and generating the preview.

expected_values.core_competencies: Cybersecurity risk assessments; Continuous monitoring; Zero-trust architecture design.
expected_values.past_performance: Supported DHS on network segmentation project; Implemented SOC modernization for mid-size federal agency.
